conservative.name: Fearsome Prayer
conservative.requirements: 5 favour. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You bellow an inspiring prayer to Sigmar. Choose the Energised, Inspired, or Invigorated condition. You and all allies within medium range gain that condition for 3 rounds

boon.description: An ally of your choice within medium range recovers 1 stress
The condition(s) granted by this blessing last for 4 rounds

bane.description: The condition(s) granted by this blessing only last 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: When this card recharges, you gain both the Demoralised and Sluggish conditions for 2 rounds

reckless.name: Fearsome Prayer
reckless.requirements: 5 favour. I you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You bellow a fearsome prayer to Sigmar. Choose the Demoralised, Frightened or Staggered condition. All enemies within medium range gain that condition for 3 rounds

boon.description: An ally within medium range recovers 1 stress

bane.description: The condition(s) granted by this blessing only last 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: You suffer the conditions granted by this blessing for 3 rounds
